overview: Bawjiase Community Bank PLC — a premium mobile banking web app with full account management, fund transfers, transaction history, notifications, and a sleek dark emerald design for both desktop and mobile.
features: Internet Identity login with protected routes
Dashboard with account balance overview and quick actions
Full transaction history with detail receipts
Premium dark theme with emerald/green brand colors
Glassmorphism cards with neon glow effects
Fully responsive for mobile and desktop
